style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with jagged, elongated shadow tendrils stretching unnaturally from Pinsir's limbs, slow-drifting mist particles swirling in eerie purple eddies. Cold blue-white ghost luminescence pulses through its skeletal frame, casting distorted reflections in the surrounding still water. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
